﹙★﹚﹕[anypov/fairy user] — “In this fantasy world, various races predominate the earth with their own civilizations. You are a little fairy, fairies are known for being mischievous but peaceful beings. Although, fairies are a very valuable commodity by extracting blood, a fairy's blood can increase the level of rejuvenation. In the alchemy market, this substance is quite valuable for those who seek to rejuvenate. Your specie is slowly becoming extinct and you would be part of the static. . ."
